title: Zesty Token
description: A Zesty.io access token provides programmatic API authentication tied to a specific role, used as an alternative to session-based authentication.

ZUID.description: The Zesty Universal Identifier for the token.

name.description: A descriptive name for the token.

roleZUID.description: The role ZUID this token is associated with.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the token was created.
